requirement_topic.en: Market Access — MSB Conformity, Import Inspection and In-Country Importer
requirement_topic.zh: 市场准入——MSB合格评定、进口检验与在地进口商
requirement_topic.zht: 市場准入——MSB合格評定、進口檢驗與在地進口商

summary.en: Lithium batteries and power banks enter Mauritius through the importer-of-record channel: a Mauritius-based importer is responsible for customs clearance through Port Louis and for meeting any product-conformity and import-inspection requirements. The Mauritius Standards Bureau （MSB） sets MS standards （adopting IEC） and operates conformity assessment and import inspection for products within its regulated scope. Where lithium batteries/power banks are in scope, the importer must present conformity evidence （test reports to the adopted MS/IEC standards） and the goods may be subject to inspection at import. There is no foreign-manufacturer self-certification regime equivalent to the EU Authorised Representative; the in-country importer carries the local compliance and liability role.
summary.zh: 锂电池和移动电源通过登记进口商渠道进入毛里求斯：毛里求斯本地进口商负责经路易港清关，并负责满足任何产品合格评定与进口检验要求。毛里求斯标准局（MSB）制定MS标准（采纳IEC），并对其受监管范围内的产品实施合格评定与进口检验。当锂电池／移动电源在范围内时，进口商须提交合格评定证据（依所采纳MS/IEC标准的测试报告），货物在进口时可能接受检验。不存在与欧盟授权代表相当的外国制造商自我认证制度；在地进口商承担当地合规与责任角色。
summary.zht: 鋰電池和行動電源透過登記進口商渠道進入模里西斯：模里西斯本地進口商負責經路易港清關，並負責滿足任何產品合格評定與進口檢驗要求。模里西斯標準局（MSB）制定MS標準（採納IEC），並對其受監管範圍內的產品實施合格評定與進口檢驗。當鋰電池／行動電源在範圍內時，進口商須提交合格評定證據（依所採納MS/IEC標準的測試報告），貨物在進口時可能接受檢驗。不存在與歐盟授權代表相當的外國製造商自我認證制度；在地進口商承擔當地合規與責任角色。

standards_or_laws: Mauritius Standards Bureau Act — MSB conformity assessment and import inspection for regulated products
Consumer Protection （Control of Imports） Regulations administered with Mauritius Revenue Authority Customs
In-country importer-of-record responsible for customs clearance via Port Louis and local conformity

summary.en: For the Chinese domestic market, a portable lithium battery is placed on sale by the domestic manufacturer or distributor under GB 31241 compliance and, for catalogue products, CCC. There is no concept of a Mauritius importer-of-record or MSB import inspection in the Chinese domestic regime. A Chinese exporter must therefore appoint or sell through a Mauritian importer; the Chinese GB/CCC paperwork supports the technical file but does not clear Mauritian customs or satisfy MSB conformity on its own.
summary.zh: 对中国国内市场，便携式锂电池由国内制造商或经销商在GB 31241合规下投放，目录产品依CCC。中国国内制度中没有毛里求斯登记进口商或MSB进口检验的概念。因此中国出口商须指定或通过毛里求斯进口商销售；中国GB／CCC文件支持技术文件，但本身不能清关毛里求斯海关或满足MSB合格评定。
summary.zht: 對中國國內市場，便攜式鋰電池由國內製造商或經銷商在GB 31241合規下投放，目錄產品依CCC。中國國內制度中沒有模里西斯登記進口商或MSB進口檢驗的概念。因此中國出口商須指定或透過模里西斯進口商銷售；中國GB／CCC文件支持技術文件，但本身不能清關模里西斯海關或滿足MSB合格評定。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241-2022 — domestic safety compliance basis for portable lithium batteries （SAC/SAMR）
CCC （China Compulsory Certification） where the finished product is catalogue-listed
No Chinese-domestic equivalent to a Mauritius importer-of-record or MSB import inspection

gap.en: The exporter cannot self-clear or self-certify into Mauritius. Key gaps: （1） a Mauritian importer-of-record must be engaged to clear customs at Port Louis and assume local responsibilities; （2） where the product category is MSB-regulated, conformity evidence to the adopted MS/IEC standards must be available and goods may be inspected at import; （3） Chinese GB 31241/CCC documents do not by themselves satisfy MSB conformity or clear customs. Exporters should confirm with MSB whether the specific product is in a regulated/inspected category and align test reports to the adopted MS/IEC editions before shipment.
gap.zh: 出口商不能自行清关或自我认证进入毛里求斯。主要差距：（1）须聘用毛里求斯登记进口商，于路易港清关并承担当地责任；（2）当产品类别受MSB监管时，须备妥依所采纳MS/IEC标准的合格评定证据，货物在进口时可能受检；（3）中国GB 31241/CCC文件本身不满足MSB合格评定或清关。出口商应向MSB确认具体产品是否属于受监管／受检类别，并在发货前使测试报告与所采纳的MS/IEC版本一致。
gap.zht: 出口商不能自行清關或自我認證進入模里西斯。主要差距：（1）須聘用模里西斯登記進口商，於路易港清關並承擔當地責任；（2）當產品類別受MSB監管時，須備妥依所採納MS/IEC標準的合格評定證據，貨物在進口時可能受檢；（3）中國GB 31241/CCC文件本身不滿足MSB合格評定或清關。出口商應向MSB確認具體產品是否屬於受監管／受檢類別，並在發貨前使測試報告與所採納的MS/IEC版本一致。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice — an in-country importer-of-record is required to clear customs at Port Louis; MSB conformity evidence and import inspection apply where the product category is regulated
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — GB 31241-2022 and CCC （where catalogue-listed） govern domestic placement; no importer-of-record concept domestically

source.publisher: Mauritius Standards Bureau （MSB） — conformity assessment and import inspection

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Market access to Mauritius runs through an in-country importer-of-record who clears customs at Port Louis and assumes local conformity duties. Where the product is in an MSB-regulated/inspected scope, conformity evidence to the adopted MS/IEC standards is needed and goods may be inspected at import. Chinese GB 31241 or CCC documents support the technical file but do not by themselves clear customs or satisfy MSB conformity; confirm the regulated scope and accepted evidence with MSB and the importer.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 进入毛里求斯市场须经在地登记进口商，由其于路易港清关并承担当地合规义务。当产品属于MSB受监管／受检范围时，须备妥依所采纳MS/IEC标准的合格评定证据，货物在进口时可能受检。中国GB 31241或CCC文件支持技术文件，但本身不能清关或满足MSB合格评定；请向MSB及进口商确认受监管范围与可接受证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 進入模里西斯市場須經在地登記進口商，由其於路易港清關並承擔當地合規義務。當產品屬於MSB受監管／受檢範圍時，須備妥依所採納MS/IEC標準的合格評定證據，貨物在進口時可能受檢。中國GB 31241或CCC文件支持技術文件，但本身不能清關或滿足MSB合格評定；請向MSB及進口商確認受監管範圍與可接受證據。
